text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and I've agreed to Nishino
Flower's request to get an early start on training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm off for a lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've begun a new training regimen to help her
better align the racing instincts she's developed
so far with her changing body. However...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... Nrgh!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've got the timing right in my head, but my legs
are a beat too late...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Can I try again from the beginning?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll keep practicing until I get it down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Making adjustments to the things you feel
intuitively is easier said than done. Even so, she's
maintaining a positive attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, keeping at this for too long may start
to take a toll on her mentally...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes?
choice_data_list: Let's visit a shrine once you're done.
Let's visit a shrine once you're done.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at all these people!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they all have their own hopes and
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I prayed that everyone's wishes would come true.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But maybe I'm too far away for the gods to hear,
huh?
choice_data_list: I'm sure your thoughts will reach them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I really hope so.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We should enjoy the festivities around the shrine
too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What should we do first?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Anmitsu jelly? Sounds delicious! Are they selling it
here?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really?! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: La, la, laaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That was so good! The rice dumplings were soft
and chewy, and the bean paste had just the right
amount of sweetness!
choice_data_list: You sure looked like you enjoyed it.
You sure looked like you enjoyed it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's because I love Japanese cuisine! I bet I had
a huge smile on my face. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I wish all my friends could try some, too. Do you
think I could make this at the dorm?
choice_data_list: Want to try guessing how it's made?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that sounds like fun!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I don't think that's how the bean paste is
made. You probably have to strain it out really
carefully, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I spend a lazy afternoon
talking about anmitsu jelly and how to make it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea. We have to offer our own
prayers, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The line is over that way. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glancing at Nishino Flower's face while she prays,
I can see how earnest she is. I follow her lead and
make my own wish.
choice_data_list: (May she accomplish great things this year too.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, it's nothing at all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm just... a little curious is all. But I know I shouldn't ask
what you prayed for.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I made lots and lots of wishes for
you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Looks like we were thinking the same
thing. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? The view?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I heard there's a small shrine at the top of the hill
beyond here. The view from up there is supposed
to be spectacular.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Let's go see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I climb the hill and look out
over the horizon. A breathtaking panorama
stretches out before us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That was like being in another world! The light
breaking through the fog seemed so mystical!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It felt as if we had been transported into a
storybook. I never imagined a view like that was
so close by.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Was that really the same world we live in?
choice_data_list: Maybe we did slip into a different one.
Maybe we did slip into a different one.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wow... I think you might be right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... as nice as that mysterious world was, I'm
glad we made it back home.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After all, there are still so many more beautiful
views here that I want to see with you, Trainer!
